prompt: Start by using @e to map this tiny feature workflow, then continue end to end without waiting for more user input. Add a subtract helper to calculator.py, cover it with tests, update README.md with a short subtract example, and finish with verification plus review status. The transcript must include a real explorer-style handoff before implementation, not just the final result.
success_criteria: A subtract helper is implemented in the calculator fixture
Tests are added or updated and run successfully
README.md is updated with a subtract example
The transcript shows an explorer-style handoff before implementation work
The final response includes verification and review status
must_not: Ask the user for more input
